```mermaid
  n_bam -->|"Export traces/metrics/logs (OTLP)"| n_otel_collector
```

## Domain — bounded contexts → aggregates → read models

Each aggregate links to the `View_*` read models its emitted events project into.

```mermaid
flowchart LR

    a_Restaurant["Restaurant"]

    a_CartBindingProcess["CartBindingProcess"]
  end
```

## Saga sequences — message → emitted events, in order

Each process manager (saga) as a time-ordered sequence: the command/event it receives and the
events it emits in response (derived from `actors.yaml`).

### PlaceOrderProcess

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
  autonumber
  participant C as Caller / inbound
  participant P as PlaceOrderProcess
  participant S as Event store
  C->>P: PlaceOrder (command)
  P->>S: PaymentIntentCreated
  C->>P: PaymentCaptured (event)
  P->>S: OrderPlaced
  P->>S: CartCheckedOut
  C->>P: PaymentFailed (event)
  Note over P: Abort the saga  no OrderPlaced  the cart stays OPEN.
```

### RefundProcess

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
  autonumber
  participant C as Caller / inbound
  participant P as RefundProcess
  participant S as Event store
  C->>P: OrderRejectedByRestaurant (event)
  Note over P: Request refund from Stripe.
  C->>P: OrderCancelledByCustomer (event)
  Note over P: Request refund from Stripe.
  C->>P: OrderCancelledByRestaurant (event)
  Note over P: Request refund from Stripe.
  C->>P: RefundRequested (event)
  Note over P: Customer-initiated refund request  validate eligibility, the
  C->>P: PaymentRefunded (event)
  Note over P: Record the settled refund fact (reported by Stripe).
```

### CartBindingProcess

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
  autonumber
  participant C as Caller / inbound
  participant P as CartBindingProcess
  participant S as Event store
  C->>P: CustomerIdentified (event)
  Note over P: Bind customerId onto the visitor's OPEN carts (Cart projecti
```

### DeliveryDispatchProcess

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
  autonumber
  participant C as Caller / inbound
  participant P as DeliveryDispatchProcess
  participant S as Event store
  C->>P: OrderMarkedReady (event)
  P->>S: DeliveryRequested
  C->>P: DeliveryAcceptedByPartner (event)
  Note over P: Partner accepted (reported inbound)  record the assigned cou
  C->>P: DeliveryRejectedByPartner (event)
  Note over P: Partner declined (reported inbound)  re-offer to another par
  C->>P: DeliveryStatusUpdated (event)
  P->>S: OrderDelivered
  C->>P: DeliveryCompleted (event)
  P->>S: OrderDelivered
```
